Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Filter Name ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the name of this filter.

Fields.Name: Filter Category
Fields.Description: The filter category this filter belongs to.

Fields.Name: Filter Value
Fields.Description: The value to pass to the conditional filter.

Fields.Name: Display Event Flag
Fields.Description: If the specified event flag is ON, this filter is displayed.
